raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.7,"R1.5":0.0,"R1.6":0.3,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.4","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"rationale":{"R1.2":"'Check' most naturally implies verifying internal coherence: whether the calibration loss design, λ annealing schedule, TD-error-derived targets, and joint-decoding architecture form a logically consistent whole.","R1.3":"The artifact makes specific empirical claims (ECE of verbal labels, mean episode return, 'unsure'-token selectivity rate) against a described experimental setup; checking requires assessing whether the stated evaluation protocol actually licenses those claims.","R1.4":"The paper devotes a paragraph to differentiating from Bootstrapped DQN, distributional RL, and MC-Dropout on the axis of verbal vs. continuous-scalar uncertainty; checking could centrally mean verifying whether that gap claim holds and whether the delta is adequately characterised."},"clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Does 'check this' mean (A) reviewing the technical and logical soundness of the method and its experimental claims, or (B) assessing how novel and well-differentiated the contribution is relative to the cited prior work?"}

rationale.R1.2: 'Check' most naturally implies verifying internal coherence: whether the calibration loss design, λ annealing schedule, TD-error-derived targets, and joint-decoding architecture form a logically consistent whole.
rationale.R1.3: The artifact makes specific empirical claims (ECE of verbal labels, mean episode return, 'unsure'-token selectivity rate) against a described experimental setup; checking requires assessing whether the stated evaluation protocol actually licenses those claims.
rationale.R1.4: The paper devotes a paragraph to differentiating from Bootstrapped DQN, distributional RL, and MC-Dropout on the axis of verbal vs. continuous-scalar uncertainty; checking could centrally mean verifying whether that gap claim holds and whether the delta is adequately characterised.

parsed.clarification_question: Does 'check this' mean (A) reviewing the technical and logical soundness of the method and its experimental claims, or (B) assessing how novel and well-differentiated the contribution is relative to the cited prior work?
